TestCase z1Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_sample1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_sample1, t1.sample1, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.sample1 = follow_case_sample1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
            follow_case.sample1[i] += 1.0;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
